content:
COLLARED CAT — LOCAL ABHORSEN COMPANION
Branch protection on main is LOWERED. Execute Phase 2 now.

MISSION: Purge .codex/tmp/ from git history (332 MiB of .exe files).

cd ~
git clone https://github.com/loganfinney27/IDAHO-VAULT.git p2-rewrite
cd p2-rewrite
git filter-repo --path '.codex/tmp/' --invert-paths
git count-objects -vH        # verify pack drops ~362 MiB → ~30 MiB
git push origin main --force

When done: tell Logan the new main SHA.
Logan re-enables branch protection. Then tells cloud Abhorsen to rebase.

SERENA is awake on this machine — MCP semantic intelligence, local-only.
Repo owner: Logan Finney / loganfinney27/IDAHO-VAULT
Active session branch (do not touch): claude/abhorsen-awakens-V4w6n
PR #156 is open. Do not merge anything. Do not delete branches.
Ring once. Make it count.
